retrieval_policy.fallback_behavior: If a listed asset cannot be retrieved, use another listed fallback from the same category. Do not enumerate the entire repo unless the user explicitly asks.

logo_primary_blue.usage: Primary OXIO logo for cover and closing slides; keep small and top-left when used.

slide_background.usage: Approved OXIO slide background/composite treatment. Use as a true slide background when the selected layout calls for it.

icons_sheet.usage: Approved OXIO icon source. Crop or reuse icons consistently when an OXIO layout expects iconography.
